metadata.name: duel
metadata.description: Duel Protocol: binary outcome markets with TWAP-resolved bonding curves

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint for the selected side (needed for transfer_checked)

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault for the selected side

accounts.name: buyer_token_account
docs: Buyer's token account for the selected side

accounts.name: quote_vault
docs: Quote vault for the selected side

accounts.name: quote_token_program
docs: Quote token program (may differ for Token-2022)

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint for the winning side

accounts.name: pool_authority
docs: Pool authority (const PDA of DAMM v2)

accounts.name: fee_receiver_token_a
docs: Fee receiver's token A account (receives claimed token fees)

accounts.name: fee_receiver_token_b
docs: Fee receiver's token B account (receives claimed WSOL fees)

accounts.name: position_nft_account
docs: Position NFT token account (market PDA is the authority)

accounts.name: event_authority
docs: Event authority PDA of DAMM v2

accounts.name: closer
docs: Anyone can close -- rent goes to rent_receiver

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault to close (optional -- only if empty)

accounts.name: quote_token_program
docs: Quote token program (may differ for Token-2022)

accounts.name: pool_vault_a
docs: WSOL vault for Side A deposits

accounts.name: pool_vault_b
docs: WSOL vault for Side B deposits

accounts.name: oracle_a
docs: Pyth price feed account for token A

accounts.name: oracle_b
docs: Pyth price feed account for token B

accounts.name: pool_vault
docs: WSOL vault for the selected side (A or B)

accounts.name: resolver
docs: Anyone can trigger emergency resolution after the window passes

accounts.name: resolver
docs: Anyone can trigger emergency resolution after the window passes

accounts.name: quote_token_program
docs: Quote token program (may differ from side token program for Token-2022)

accounts.name: config
docs: Program config (pause check + market creation fee)

accounts.name: creator_fee_account
docs: Creator fee recipient -- must be a valid account

accounts.name: oracle_a
docs: Pyth price feed account for token A

accounts.name: oracle_b
docs: Pyth price feed account for token B

accounts.name: market_token_ata
docs: Resolver's ATA for winning side tokens (pre-created by caller)

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint for the selected side (needed for transfer_checked)

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault for the selected side

accounts.name: quote_vault
docs: Quote vault for the selected side

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint for the selected side (needed for transfer_checked)

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault for the selected side

accounts.name: quote_vault
docs: Quote vault for the selected side

accounts.name: pool_vault
docs: Winning side's pool vault (or vault matching deposit side for draw)

errors.name: MarketNotExpired
errors.msg: Market has not reached its deadline yet

errors.name: TwapSampleTooEarly
errors.msg: TWAP sample too early, interval not elapsed

errors.name: EmergencyResolveTooEarly
errors.msg: Emergency resolution window has not passed yet

errors.name: WinnerMismatch
errors.msg: Expected winner does not match TWAP result

errors.name: EmergencyOnlyOperation
errors.msg: This operation is only available for emergency-resolved (draw) markets

errors.name: InsufficientReserveForGraduation
errors.msg: Insufficient reserve for DEX graduation (minimum 0.1 SOL)

errors.name: InvalidOracle
errors.msg: Oracle account is not a valid Pyth price feed

errors.name: OracleStale
errors.msg: Oracle price is stale (older than 60 seconds)

errors.name: OracleConfidenceTooWide
errors.msg: Oracle confidence interval exceeds 10% of price

errors.name: DuelNotResolved
errors.msg: Duel must be resolved before withdrawal

errors.name: DepositPeriodEnded
errors.msg: Deposit period has ended (TWAP window started)

errors.name: OneSideEmpty
errors.msg: Cannot resolve: one side has zero deposits

fields.name: oracle_a
docs: Pyth price feed for token A

fields.name: oracle_b
docs: Pyth price feed for token B

fields.name: pool_vault_a
docs: WSOL vault for Side A deposits

fields.name: pool_vault_b
docs: WSOL vault for Side B deposits

fields.name: side_a_total
docs: Total SOL deposited on Side A (lamports)

fields.name: side_b_total
docs: Total SOL deposited on Side B (lamports)

fields.name: start_price_a
docs: Price at first TWAP sample for token A (scaled 10^9)

fields.name: start_price_b
docs: Price at first TWAP sample for token B (scaled 10^9)

fields.name: twap_accumulator_a
docs: TWAP price accumulator for token A

fields.name: twap_accumulator_b
docs: TWAP price accumulator for token B

fields.name: status
docs: Current duel status (reuses Mode 1 MarketStatus enum)

fields.name: winner
docs: Winner side index: None = draw/unresolved, Some(0) = A, Some(1) = B

fields.name: net_pool
docs: Total pool minus fees, set at resolution (used by withdraw)

fields.name: emergency_window
docs: Emergency resolution window in seconds after deadline

fields.name: withdrawn
docs: Whether the deposit has been withdrawn

fields.name: winner
docs: Winner side index (0 = A, 1 = B), None if not resolved or emergency draw

fields.name: emergency_window
docs: Emergency resolution window in seconds after deadline

types.name: MarketResolved
docs: Emitted when market resolves and graduates to DEX atomically

types.name: ProgramConfig
docs: Global protocol configuration, owned by admin.

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin authority (can pause, update config, transfer admin)

fields.name: market_creation_fee
docs: Market creation fee in lamports (0 = free)

fields.name: trade_fee_bps
docs: Trade fee in basis points (applied to every buy/sell)

fields.name: creator_fee_split_bps
docs: Creator's share of trade fee in basis points (e.g., 5000 = 50%)

fields.name: quote_reserve_vault
docs: Vault holding quote tokens (WSOL) from buys

fields.name: twap_accumulator
docs: Sum of price samples for TWAP (u128 to prevent overflow)
